description.value: Cost: 1 Requirements: Ranged weapon, target within range Effect: Make an attack roll (Dexterity + Ranged Combat). Making a ranged attack while threatened (enemy within 5 feet) add 1 to both attack dice. Shooting into Melee: Add 1 to both die results

system.effect: Make an attack roll (Dexterity + Ranged Combat). Making a ranged attack while threatened (enemy within 5 feet) add 1 to both attack dice. Shooting into Melee: Add 1 to both die results
